sections.title: Shared starting
Talking to Reldo

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello stranger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of a quest.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hmmm. I don't... believe there are any here...

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Let me think actually...

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Ah yes. I think I have something, if you're definitely interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Well if you look in a book called 'The Shield of Arrav', you'll find a quest in there.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: I'm not sure where the book is mind you... but I'm sure it's around here somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't think I am. Goodbye.

sections.title: Finding "The Shield of Arrav" book

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aha! 'The Shield of Arrav'! Exactly what I was looking for.

sections.title: Talking to Reldo before reading the book
Talking to Reldo after reading the book

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. I've read the book. Do you know where I can find the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: No, I don't. I think I know someone who might, however.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: If I were you I would talk to Baraek, the fur trader in the market place. I've heard he has connections with the Phoenix Gang.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. I'll try that!

sections.title: Black Arm Gang
Talking to Charlie the Tramp

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Spare some change, guv?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything down this alleyway?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Funny you should mention that...there is actually.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: The ruthless and notorious criminal gang known as the Black Arm Gang have their headquarters down there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think they would let me join?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: You never know. You'll find a lady down there called Katrine. Speak to her.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: But don't upset her, she's pretty dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the warning!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Don't worry about it.

sections.title: Talking to Katrine

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: It's a private business. Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard you're the Black Arm Gang.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Who told you that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather not reveal my sources.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Yes, I can understand that. So what do you want with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to become a member of your gang.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: How unusual.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Normally we recruit for our gang by watching local thugs and thieves in action. People don't normally waltz in here saying 'hello, can I play'.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: How can I be sure you can be trusted?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you can give me a try can't you?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I'm not so sure.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Thinking about it... I may have a solution actually.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Our rival gang - the Phoenix Gang - has a weapons stash a little east of here.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: We're fresh out of crossbows, so if you could steal a couple of crossbows for us it would be very much appreciated.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Then I'll be happy to call you a Black Arm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds simple enough. Any particular reason you need two of them?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I have an idea for framing a local merchant who is refusing to pay our, very reasonable, 'keep-your-life-pleasant' insurance rates. I need two phoenix crossbows; one to kill somebody important with and the other to

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: hide in the merchant's house where the local law can find it! When they find it, they'll suspect him of murdering the target for the Phoenix Gang and, hopefully, arrest the whole gang! Leaving us as the only

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: thieves gang in Varrock! Brilliant, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, brilliant. So who are you planning to murder?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I haven't decided yet, but it'll need to be somebody important. Say, why are you being so nosey? You aren't with the law are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, no! Just curious.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: You'd better just keep your mouth shut about this plan, or I'll make sure it stays shut for you. Now, are you going to go get those crossbows or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, no problem.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Great! You'll find the Phoenix gang's weapon stash just next to a temple, due east of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds a little tricky...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got anything easier?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: If you're not up to a little bit of danger I don't think you've got anything to offer our gang.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, people tell me I have an honest face!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: ... How unusual. Someone honest wanting to join a gang of thieves. Excuse me if I remain unconvinced.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want some hints for becoming a thief.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry luv, I'm not giving away any of my secrets.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Not to people who ain't Black Arm members anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the door out of here.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Try...the one you just came in?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was Charlie, the tramp outside.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Is that guy still out there? He's getting to be a nuisance. Remind me to send someone to kill him.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: So now you've found us, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Everyone knows. It's no great secret.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I thought we were safe back here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no, not at all... It's so obvious! Even the town guard have caught on...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Wow! We MUST be obvious! I guess they'll be expecting bribes again soon in that case.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Is there anything else you want to tell me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of business?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: A small, family business. We give financial advice to other companies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for fame and riches.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: And you expect to find it up the back streets of Varrock?

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Black Arm Gang hideout before joining
Talking to Charlie the Tramp after accepting Katrine's task

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Spare some change, guv?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any idea where the Phoenix gang hideout is?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Sure. I know everything there is to know about this city. I'd be happy to tell you for 10 gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, that sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wait. I haven't got enough, sorry.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well no pay, no info.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Great, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the hideout then?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Now listen closely; to get to the Phoenix hideout, walk south from here and take the first road to the east. It's the one with the Blue moon pub on the corner. Take the first alley leading south off of that road and you'll

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: find the hideout at the end of that alley. It's called the VTAM corporation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: VTAM, got it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll find it myself.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well you know where to find me if you get lost!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 10 gold? That's too much, I'll give you 5.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I guess that'll have to do then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wait. I haven't got enough, sorry.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well no pay, no info.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Great, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the hideout then?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: If you pay me the other 5 gold, I'll tell you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You theiving gutter-scum! You'd better watch your back!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Yeah, sure, whatever. You don't frighten me, pal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not fair, but I guess I don't have a choice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wait. I haven't got enough, sorry.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Well no pay, no info.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Great, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where is the hideout then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I know where the hideout is, but I can't get inside. Any ideas?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Hmmm. I dunno.

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: Your best bet would probably be to find someone else... Someone who ISN'T a member of the Black Arm Gang, and get them to infiltrate the ranks of the Phoenix Gang for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. Good plan!

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: I'm not just a pretty face!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like who?

lines.speaker: Charlie the Tramp
lines.text: There's plenty of other adventurers about besides yourself. I'm sure if you asked one of them nicely they would help you.

sections.title: Talking to Katrine again after accepting her task

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Have you got those crossbows for me yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I haven't yet found them.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I need two crossbows stolen from the Phoenix Gang weapons stash, which if you head east for a bit, is a building on the south side of the road.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Come back when you got 'em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have one...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: I need two. Come back when you have them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Ok. You can join our gang now. Feel free to enter any of the rooms of the ganghouse.

sections.title: Talking to Katrine after joining the Black Arm Gang

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are all those people in there?

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: They're just various rogues and thieves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They don't say a lot...

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Teach me to be a top class criminal.

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Teach yourself.

sections.title: Entering the Black Arm Gang hideout
Searching the Black Arm Gang's cupboard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got this half of the shield in my bank already.

sections.title: Talking to Straven after joining the Black Arm Gang

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You stay away from here! Black Arm dog!

sections.title: Phoenix Gang
Talking to Baraek

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Sh sh sh, not so loud! You don't want to get me in trouble!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So DO you know where they are?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: I may do.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: But I don't want to get into trouble for revealing their hideout.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Of course, if I was, say 20 gold coins richer I may happen to be more inclined to take that sort of risk...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. Have 20 gold coins.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Ok, to get to the gang hideout, enter Varrock through the south gate. Then, if you take the first turning east, somewhere along there is an alleyway to the south. The door at the end of there is the entrance to the Phoenix

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Gang. They're operating there under the name of the VTAM Corporation. Be careful. The Phoenixes ain't the types to be messed about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh....oops. My mistake. I don't have 20 coins. Silly me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't like things like bribery.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Heh. If you wanna deal with the Phoenix Gang they're involved in much worse than a bit of bribery.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'd like to be 20 gold coins richer.

sections.title: Talking to Straven

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's through that door?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Hey! You can't go in there. Only authorised personnel of the VTAM Corporation are allowed beyond this point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know who you are!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Really.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Well?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Who are we then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is the headquarters of the Phoenix Gang, the most powerful crime syndicate this city has ever seen!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: No, this is a legitimate business run by legitimate businessmen.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Supposing we were this crime gang however, what would you want with us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to offer you my services.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You mean you'd like to join the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Well, obviously I can't speak for them, but the Phoenix Gang doesn't let people join just like that.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You can't be too careful, you understand.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Generally someone has to prove their loyalty before they can join.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I go about doing that?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Obviously, I would have no idea about that.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Although having said that, a rival gang of ours, er, theirs, called the Black Arm Gang is supposedly meeting a contact from Port Sarim today in the Blue Moon Inn.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: The Blue Moon Inn is just by the south entrance to this city, and supposedly the name of the contact is Jonny the Beard.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: OBVIOUSLY I know NOTHING about the dealings of the Phoenix Gang, but I bet if SOMEBODY were to kill him and bring back his intelligence report, they would be considered loyal enough to join.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll get right on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want nothing. I was just making sure you were them.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Well, then get lost and stop wasting my time.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: ...if you know what's good for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get a job with the VTAM corporation?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Get a copy of the Varrock Herald. If we have any positions right now, they'll be advertised in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Sorry. That's classified information.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Phoenix Gang hideout before joining
Talking to Straven after accepting his task

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: How's your little mission going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven’t managed to find the report yet…

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You need to kill Jonny the Beard, who should be in the Blue Moon Inn.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: ...I would guess. Not being a member of the Phoenix Gang and all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the intelligence report!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Let's see it then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me go get it.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: I'll wait here.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Yes. Yes, this is very good. Very well, then! You can join the Phoenix Gang! I am Straven, one of the gang leaders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You now have access to the inner sanctum of our subterranean hideout, and our weapons supply depot round the front of this building.

sections.title: Talking to Straven after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Greetings fellow gang member.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard you've got some cool treasures in this place...

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Oh yeah, we've all stolen some stuff in our time. Those candlesticks down here, for example, were quite a challenge to get out of the palace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And the shield of Arrav? I heard you got that!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Woah... that's a blast from the past! We stole that years and years ago! We don't even have all the shield anymore.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: About five years ago we had a massive fight in our gang and the shield got broken in half during that fight.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Shortly after that fight some gang members decided they didn't want to be part of our gang anymore. So they split off to form their own gang.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: The Black Arm Gang.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: On their way out they looted what treasures they could from us - which included one of the halves of the shield. We've been rivals with the Black Arms ever since.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any suggestions for where I can go thieving?

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You can always try the marketplace in Ardougne. LOTS of opportunity there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's the Black Arm Gang hideout? I wanna go sabotage 'em!

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: That would be a little tricky; their security is pretty good.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Not as good as ours, obviously.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: But still good.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: If you really want to go there, it's in the alleyway to the west as you come in the south gate.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: One of our operatives is often near the alley - a red haired tramp, goes by the name of Charlie. He may be able to give you some ideas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the help!

sections.title: Talking to Straven after losing the weapon store key

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: Greetings fellow gang member.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I've lost the key you gave me.

lines.speaker: Straven
lines.text: You really need to be more careful. We don't want that key falling into the wrong hands. Ah well... Have this spare. Don't lose THIS one.

sections.title: Entering the Phoenix Gang hideout after joining
Searching the Phoenix Gang's chest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got this half of the shield in my bank already.

sections.title: Talking to the Weaponsmaster after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Hello fellow Phoenix! What are you after?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm after a weapon or two.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: No problem. Feel free to look around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for treasure.

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Aren't we all? We've not got any up here. Go mug someone somewhere if you want some treasure.

sections.title: Attempting to take a Phoenix crossbow after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Weaponsmaster
lines.text: Hey! That's Stravens'! He won't like you messing with that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, sorry.

sections.title: Talking to Katrine after joining the Phoenix Gang

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: You've got some guts coming here, Phoenix guy!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Now get lost!

lines.speaker: Katrine
lines.text: Or I'll make sure you 'aven't got those guts anymore!

sections.title: Tradeable items
Inspecting a weapon store key
Inspecting a Phoenix crossbow
Inspecting a certificate half
Using a tradeable quest item on another player
Finishing up
Talking to Curator Haig Halen

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have half the shield of Arrav here. Can I get a reward?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The Shield of Arrav! Goodness, the Museum has been searching for that for years! The late King Roald II offered a reward for it years ago!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm here to claim it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Let me have a look at it first.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: This is incredible!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: That shield has been missing for over twenty-five years!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Leave the shield here with me and I'll write you out a certificate saying that you have returned the shield, so that you can claim your reward from the King.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have two certificates please?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Yes, certainly. Please hand over the shield.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Of course you won't actually be able to claim the reward with only half the reward certificates...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? I went through a lot of trouble to get that shield piece and now you tell me it was for nothing? That's not very fair!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Well, if you were to get me the other half of the shield, I could give you the other half of the reward certificate. It's rumoured to be in the possession of the infamous Blackarm Gang, beyond that I can't help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll see what I can do.

sections.title: Talking to King Roald before obtaining a full certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings, your majesty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your majesty, I have recovered the Shield of Arrav; I would like to claim the reward.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: The Shield of Arrav, eh? Yes, I do recall my father, King Roald, put a reward out for that.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: If you get the authenticity of the shield verified by the curator at the museum and then return here with authentication, I will grant you your reward.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: I'm afraid that's only half the reward certificate. You'll have to get the other half and join them together if you want to claim the reward.

sections.title: Talking to King Roald after obtaining a full certificate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings, your majesty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your majesty, I have come to claim the reward for the return of the Shield Of Arrav.

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: My goodness! This claim is for the reward offered by my father many years ago!

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: I never thought I would live to see the day when someone came forward to claim this reward!

lines.speaker: King Roald
lines.text: I heard that you found half the shield, so I will give you half of the bounty. That comes to exactly 600gp!
